construction_rule.boundary_band: original rewrite-complex subgraph induced by core nodes plus the exterior frontier
construction_rule.core_selector: nodes with full six-sector coverage and signature-union count at least 155
construction_rule.core_subcomplex: rewrite-complex subgraph induced by the selected core nodes
construction_rule.finite_boundary: core nodes and exterior frontier nodes incident to a core-complement edge
construction_rule.interval_collapse: union of the 46 full-sector plus high-signature geodesic intervals
